title: Bolin Creek water quality concerns after storm runoff
text: Residents along Bolin Creek report discoloration and odor after recent storm runoff. The town board scheduled a public works briefing; neighborhood associations are organizing for answers.

title: Carrboro residents raise water concerns
text: INDY Week reports that Carrboro neighbors are documenting creek conditions and pushing for faster water testing after heavy rains.

title: Caswell County school board faces budget gap
text: The Caswell County Board of Education faces a budget gap heading into fall, with proposed cuts to arts and after-school programs. Parent groups and teachers' associations are mobilizing ahead of the July budget vote.

title: Northside affordable housing debate intensifies
text: Rising rents and limited inventory are squeezing longtime Northside residents. A proposed infill development has sparked debate over displacement versus new affordable units.

title: Chapel Hill Transit proposes crosstown route cuts
text: Chapel Hill Transit proposed eliminating two crosstown routes to close a budget shortfall. Riders and transit advocates are pushing back, citing disproportionate impact on working families and UNC staff.

title: Northern Caswell broadband expansion delayed
text: Farmers and small businesses around Milton report unreliable internet after a provider delayed fiber expansion. County commissioners are weighing a public-private partnership to close coverage gaps.
